ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Three-letter code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "airport_city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "airport_state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport's location */,
  "airport_country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airport */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the airport */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the airport */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport where the flight departs */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "airline" TEXT /* Airline operating the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "destination_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination airport */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., on time, delayed, canceled) */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date of the flight */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the flight */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the flight */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number where the flight departs or arrives */,
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the terminal where the flight departs or arrives */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flight */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of cargo on the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_destination_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terminals" (
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terminal */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport where the terminal is located */,
  "terminal_name" TEXT /* Name of the terminal */,
  "gate_count" INTEGER /* Number of gates in the terminal */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the terminal in terms of passengers */,
  "terminal_type" TEXT /* Type of terminal (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the terminal was opened */,
  "last_renovation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last renovation */,
  "security_checkpoints" INTEGER /* Number of security checkpoints */,
  "baggage_claim_areas" INTEGER /* Number of baggage claim areas */,
  "parking_spots" INTEGER /* Number of parking spots */,
  "food_and_beverage_outlets" INTEGER /* Number of food and beverage outlets */,
  "retail_stores" INTEGER /* Number of retail stores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terminals_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport where the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "completed_by" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance crew or contractor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "maintenance_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor overseeing the maintenance */,
  "inspection_report" TEXT /* Inspection report after maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, airline staff, public user) */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "last_activity_time" TEXT /* Time of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the account */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last modified the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "module_accessed" TEXT /* Module or section of the system accessed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "data_modified" INTEGER /* Whether any data was modified during the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
